Adds a Codex reset-announcement model, a pure text parser, and Swift Testing coverage for completed, upcoming, ambiguous, and false-positive reset phrases.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR adds a feature foundation rather than fixing a failing current-main behavior. Source inspection shows a pure parser/model plus focused tests.
